steps.title: Hardware Identification
steps.content: Verify package contents including support bar, clamping bracket, and bolts.

es.title: Identificación de Herrajes
es.content: Verify package contents including support bar, clamping bracket, and bolts.

steps.title: Clamp to Post
steps.content: Clamp the mid-mount support bracket onto the trimmer rack vertical post using the provided bolts.

es.title: Clamp to Post
es.content: Clamp the mid-mount support bracket onto the trimmer rack vertical post using the provided bolts.

steps.title: Adjust Height
steps.content: Slide bracket up or down to align with the trimmer's hedge attachment shaft. Tighten bolts once set.
